results.question: How many total maintenance orders are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders are currently open?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id WHERE s.status_name = 'pending' LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders have been completed?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id WHERE s.status_name = 'completed' LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders are cancelled?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.status IN (SELECT status_id FROM master_maintenance_status WHERE status_name = 'cancelled') LIMIT 100

results.question: How many high priority maintenance orders are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'high' LIMIT 100

results.question: How many low priority maintenance orders exist?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'low' LIMIT 100

results.question: How many urgent maintenance orders are there?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'urgent' LIMIT 100

results.question: Which department has the most maintenance orders?

sql.query: SELECT pl.location_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM maintenance_order m JOIN property_location pl ON m.location_uuid = pl.location_uuid GROUP BY pl.location_name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many open orders does each department have?

sql.query: SELECT p.location_name, COUNT(*) AS pending_orders FROM maintenance_order m JOIN property_location p ON m.location_uuid = p.location_uuid WHERE m.status = 1 GROUP BY p.location_name ORDER BY pending_orders DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

results.question: Which departments have high priority maintenance orders?

sql.query: SELECT p.priority_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'high' GROUP BY p.priority_name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 100

results.question: Show maintenance order count by status

sql.query: SELECT s.status_name, COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id GROUP BY s.status_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

results.question: Show maintenance order count by priority

sql.query: SELECT p.priority_name, COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id GROUP BY p.priority_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

results.question: What is the distribution of maintenance orders by status and priority?

sql.query: SELECT s.status_name, p.priority_name, COUNT(*)::FLOAT / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order), 0) AS proportion FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id GROUP BY s.status_name, p.priority_name ORDER BY proportion DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

results.question: Which status has the most maintenance orders?

sql.query: SELECT s.status_name, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id GROUP BY s.status_name ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Show high priority open maintenance orders

sql.query: SELECT m.maintenance_no, m.created_date FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'high' AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.created_date DESC LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were created this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were created this week?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

results.question: Show maintenance orders created in the last 30 days

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.created_date >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were created last week?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) AND m.created_date < DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 week' LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were completed this year?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.completed_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) LIMIT 100

results.question: Show orders created in the last 7 days

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.created_date >= (DATEADD(day, -7, CURRENT_DATE)) LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were cancelled last month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m WHERE m.cancelled_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND m.cancelled_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' LIMIT 100

results.question: Show the monthly trend of maintenance orders created

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', m.created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM maintenance_order m GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

results.question: Show weekly maintenance order trend for this year

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', m.created_date) AS week_start, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM maintenance_order m WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.created_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('week', m.created_date) ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('week', m.created_date) LIMIT 100

results.question: How many maintenance orders were created each day this month?

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', m.created_date) AS MONTHLY_DATE, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM maintenance_order m WHERE DATE_PART('year', m.created_date) = DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) AND DATE_PART('month', m.created_date) = DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY MONTHLY_DATE ORDER BY MONTHLY_DATE LIMIT 100

results.question: Show trend of high priority orders by month

sql.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', m.created_date) AS MONTH, COUNT(*) AS high_priority_orders FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE p.priority_name = 'high' GROUP BY MONTH ORDER BY MONTH LIMIT 100

results.question: Show maintenance order count by location

sql.query: SELECT pl.location_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM maintenance_order m JOIN property_location pl ON m.location_uuid = pl.location_uuid GROUP BY pl.location_name ORDER BY order_count DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100

results.question: Which location has the most maintenance orders?

sql.query: SELECT pl.location_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM maintenance_order m JOIN property_location pl ON m.location_uuid = pl.location_uuid GROUP BY pl.location_name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What percentage of maintenance orders are completed?

sql.query: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN m.status = s.status_id AND s.status_name = 'completed' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS percentage_completed FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id LIMIT 100

results.question: What is the most common maintenance order type?

sql.query: SELECT m.type, COUNT(*) AS COUNT FROM maintenance_order m GROUP BY m.type ORDER BY COUNT DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Show the 10 most recent maintenance orders

sql.query: SELECT m.maintenance_no, m.created_date FROM maintenance_order m ORDER BY m.created_date DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: How many maintenance orders were created vs completed this month?

sql.query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN m.created_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 END) AS created_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN m.completed_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 END) AS completed_count FROM maintenance_order m LIMIT 100

results.question: What are the most recent 5 completed maintenance orders?

sql.query: SELECT m.maintenance_no, m.created_date FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id WHERE s.status_name = 'completed' ORDER BY m.created_date DESC LIMIT 5

results.question: Show cancelled orders from last month grouped by priority

sql.query: SELECT p.priority_name, COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_order m JOIN master_maintenance_status s ON m.status = s.status_id JOIN master_job_priority p ON m.priority = p.priority_id WHERE s.status_name = 'cancelled' AND created_date >= DATEADD(month, -1, date_trunc('month', current_date)) GROUP BY p.priority_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100
